name: Calculateur de Somme Arithmétique
description: Calculez la somme des n premiers termes d'une suite arithmétique.
seo_description: Calculez la somme des n premiers termes d'une suite arithmétique. Calculateur gratuit, précis et instantané. Outil gratuit avec formule et exemples.
example_label: Calculate results using the provided input values.

range_hints.a1: Enter value within min-max range shown.

range_hints.n: Enter value within min-max range shown.

result_context: The calculeted result provides the main output value.
steps: Calculate and display the sum result
mistakes: Not verifying input values are within realistic ranges for your scenario
Entering zero or negative values where positive numbers are required
Rounding intermediate results too early in multi-step calculetions
